label: Fal Image Generation
summary: Use when a Next.js App Router project needs a focused server-side text-to-image endpoint backed by Fal through the Vercel AI SDK. Provides a POST API route, shared request types, a single-provider config, and client-side helpers for previewing, sharing, or downloading returned base64 images.

envVars.purpose: Fal API key used only by the server API route to authenticate image generation requests. Create or copy it from the Fal dashboard/account settings.

notes: Focused Fal-only extraction; omit template UI, analytics, layout, provider matrices. Route uses `generateImage` from ai v7 (renamed from experimental_generateImage). lastVerified carries the legacy source's date until the first preview/generate-test selects this dossier (no-false-green rule from PR #422).
